name: Oysters Poached in White Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a nonreactive pot.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over moderate heat.
3. Remove from heat and allow to cool to room temperature.
4. Discard the crushed garlic clove before serving.
5. Serves four as a first course, two as a light entree.
6. This elegant first course looks very attractive served in clear glass bowls or clear stemmed dessert dishes.
7. Serve fresh heated French bread with sweet butter to sop up these wonderful juices.
